        - x^8*(14190*x^40 - 3300*x^39 - 1410*x^38 + 18832*x^37 - 14689*x^36 + 20744*x^35 - 4028*x^34 + 4260*x^33 + 15789*x^32 - 11186*x^31 + 26201*x^30 - 11176*x^29 + 18666*x^28 + 6226*x^27 - 1703*x^26 + 28168*x^25 - 12662*x^24 + 19864*x^23 + 38480*x^22 - 97392*x^21 - 452703*x^20 - 81212*x^19 - 16378*x^18 + 25388*x^17 - 31718*x^16 + 31548*x^15 - 28878*x^14 + 24048*x^13 - 19344*x^12 + 14388*x^11 - 10510*x^10 + 7024*x^9 - 4679*x^8 + 2754*x^7 - 1669*x^6 + 824*x^5 - 464*x^4 + 174*x^3 - 105*x^2 + 24*x - 21)*y^4
        + x^8*(990*x^39 - 450*x^38 + 457*x^37 + 713*x^36 - 768*x^35 + 1800*x^34 - 1427*x^33 + 2073*x^32 - 1201*x^31 + 1531*x^30 - 306*x^29 + 506*x^28 + 911*x^27 - 741*x^26 + 2376*x^25 - 2424*x^24 + 4692*x^23 - 5636*x^22 + 9543*x^21 - 12753*x^20 - 25662*x^19 - 10678*x^18 + 4323*x^17 - 3673*x^16 + 2838*x^15 - 2178*x^14 + 1638*x^13 - 1218*x^12 + 882*x^11 - 630*x^10 + 434*x^9 - 294*x^8 + 189*x^7 - 119*x^6 + 69*x^5 - 39*x^4 + 19*x^3 - 9*x^2 + 3*x - 1)*y^3
        - x^24*(45*x^22 - 32*x^21 + 52*x^20 - 16*x^19 + 20*x^18 + 30*x^17 - 33*x^16 + 88*x^15 - 89*x^14 + 140*x^13 - 130*x^12 + 168*x^11 - 138*x^10 + 154*x^9 - 95*x^8 + 80*x^7 + 17*x^6 - 72*x^5 + 216*x^4 - 320*x^3 - 1625*x^2 - 220*x - 10)*y^2
        + x^24*(x^21 - x^20 + 2*x^19 - 2*x^18 + 3*x^17 - 3*x^16 + 4*x^15 - 4*x^14 + 5*x^13 - 5*x^12 + 6*x^11 - 6*x^10 + 7*x^9 - 7*x^8 + 8*x^7 - 8*x^6 + 9*x^5 - 9*x^4 + 10*x^3 - 10*x^2 - 55*x - 5)*y
        + x^24;
q := (x*y + x + y - 1)/(x*y - x + y - 1);
t := (-x*y - x - y + 1)/(x*y - x - y + 1);
E:=[1,(q^2-1)*(t^2-1)/16,(q^2-1)*(t^2-1)/16,0,0];
P:=[(q+1)*(t^2-1)/8,(q+1)^2*(t-1)^2*(t+1)/32];
